title: Mutzman's Modpack
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d27c5eb52a31f44c8e354cb2b59c4df6f0405b.png)

Performance and quality of life mods that make Minecraft run smoother and faster while still looking beautiful. This modpack is entirely client side and still keeps the original "Minecraft" feel without overloading the game.

_**RECCOMMENDED FOR VERSION 1.21.11**_

_**LOSS OF FEATURES IN VERSIONS 26.1-26.1.2 AND 1.21.10**_

Mutzman's Modpack contains a collection of mods that enritely rewrite some of Minecraft's code, optimizing itself and pushing performance without looking horrible. Additionally, it provides beneficial and quality features with no lag or FPS drawbakcs like hundreds of chunk render distance or the high framerate and compatibility with shaders. It makes the game run smoother and adds tweaks that you can't live without after using while not changing Minecrafy into a completrly different game. 

It is reccommended to play on 10 chunk render and simulation distance to maximize FPS. The modpack is mostly client side and can techincally run on servers, but some features are disabled on multiplayer servers. Made for single player or small world with friends.

Disable the following to make it truly client-side and prevent crashes:
- Trade Cycling
- Visible Traders
- Enchanted Booksheves
- Bokshelf Inspector

Also notice that some mods are client-side but are banned on servers for provides competitive advantages, be aware.

**_INSTALLATION:_**
To install this modpack you must visit this site: https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/. Then attach the modpack and download the converted zip file. From there access your version mod folder from whatever launcher you are using and open up the mods folder within the zip file and drag everything from there into the verion mod folder.

_**WARNING:**_
Atmosperics mod will make the game look funky and weird, attached is a tailored preset that matches the gallery pictures. Other mods are also tweaked in game and several settings are changed to make the modpack optimal. Ensure Fog is turned OFF.

[ATMOSPHERICS PRESET DOWNLOAD](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1ggiV_WJasj4E8iC1dSbZCCeGc7Pfvt0M)

![bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ef302c92f5f000d693cae7426015e6db8dcb2f.png)

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7209d278b86b76ea0f1331afa48d20400367d5c5.png)

Modrinth only allows current game version resource packs, so here are the included resource packs that will still work despite the game version.

**RESOURCE PACKS:**

- [(Bee's) Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops)

COMPUTER SPECS:
Ryzen 9 5900x
RX 6900 XT
64 GB DDR4
2 TB NVME
